topics: Familiarization of Python & QT Octave programming - Generation of elementary signals and its basic operations
Basic signal processing operations (Convolution, Correlation, Digital filters, etc.)
Analysis of ECG (calculation of heart rate & parameters related to QRS complex, P wave & T wave)
Analysis of respiratory signal and calculation of respiratory rate
Analysis of PPG signal and calculation of pulse rate
Time & frequency domain analysis of HRV from ECG and using HRV software
Time domain filtering of bio signal for removal of baseline drift & high frequency noise
Power line interference rejection from bio signals
Detection of Premature Ventricular Contraction in ECG
Estimation of dicrotic notch from PPG signal
Time and frequency domain analysis of EMG signal
Concurrent signal analysis with ECG, PPG and PCG
Familiarisation of Python toolbox (biosppy, neurokit2, etc.) for bio signal processing
Arrhythmia classification using machine learning techniques
Analysis of speech signal (identification of voiced, unvoiced and silent portion, etc.)
